# Trendly

> Danish affiliate content pipeline with MCP server for AI-assisted article generation.

## What this is

Trendly is a Node.js service that generates, validates, and publishes Danish affiliate articles
from PriceRunner product data. It exposes an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server on port 3001
so AI agents can drive the full pipeline programmatically.

## MCP tools

- get_brief: Fetches product data from PriceRunner and returns a structured content brief plus
  per-type writing instructions. Returns a job_id for use with subsequent tools.
- validate_article: Validates a Markdown article against its brief. Checks word count, affiliate
  disclosure, SEO signals, widget placements, and brand voice. Returns pass/fail with specific issues.
- publish_article: Converts a Markdown article to HTML, injects PriceRunner affiliate
  widgets, and publishes to WordPress via REST API.

## Key docs

- README.md: Quick start, MCP connection instructions, project layout
- ARCHITECTURE.md: System map, ADRs, environment variables
- .agents/flows/article-pipeline/FLOW.md: End-to-end orchestration flow
